verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We're in a heavenly celebration It's the glorious union The united Bride from every nation The redeemed Church of Jesus Christ

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The feast of the great overcomers I will not let it pass me by A new song the Bride of Christ is singing Let the redeemed shout And praise the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We'll sing songs, we are triumphant With tears of joy we'll praise our King The feast of victorious overcomers Only the redeemed shall enter in
